chunks.title: Jonah's Flight to Tarshish
chunks.reason: Introduces the divine command and Jonah's immediate reaction to flee.

chunks.title: The Storm and the Sleeping Prophet
chunks.reason: Describes the storm sent by God and the captain's interaction with Jonah.

chunks.title: The Lots Fall on Jonah
chunks.reason: Sailors cast lots to identify the culprit and question Jonah about his identity.

chunks.title: Jonah's Proposal to be Thrown Overboard
chunks.reason: Sailors ask how to calm the sea and Jonah suggests throwing him in.

chunks.title: The Sailors' Prayer and Sacrifice
chunks.reason: Sailors pray to Yahweh for mercy before casting Jonah into the sea.

chunks.title: Jonah Swallowed by the Fish
chunks.reason: Concludes the chapter with God appointing the fish to swallow Jonah.
